raw_results.snippet: Source-domain: dissolution ceremony — vertical/horizontal cuts, push sand to heap, pour into river; 5-20 day construction destroyed in hours.
Source-domain: impermanence + non-attachment teaching via deliberate destruction.
LLM-side: 'Scratchpad Thinking — Alternation Between Storage and Computation in Latent Reasoning Models'; structured scratchpad-computation cycle.
LLM-side: 'State over Tokens: Characterizing the Role of Reasoning Tokens'; tokens-as-ephemeral-state framing.
